Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 1 to 3 show idle baseline with temperature around 20 to 21 pressure 1 vibration 0 material flow 0 tool position 0 and low energy

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 4 to 6 show a clear active phase with rising temperature from 50 to 58 vibration from 30 to 38 material flow at 5 tool position increasing from 5 to 10 and energy rising from 2 to 3

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This looks like cutting because high temperature vibration and material flow together with advancing tool position are consistent with material removal

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 7 to 8 show a different stable phase with temperature 40 pressure 2 vibration 10 material flow 2 tool position 15 and energy 2

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: This maybe assembling with moderate temperature higher pressure and lower flow indicating a controlled joining or positioning step

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 9 shows an extreme spike with temperature 80 pressure 2 vibration 50 material flow 0 tool position 15 and energy 5

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This maybe welding because it has very high temperature and energy with no material flow which fits a localized heat based joining action

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 10 to 12 show reduced activity with temperature 30 to 25 pressure 1 low vibration from 1 to 5 flow 0 to 1 tool position 15 to 20 and energy about 1 to 1 point 6

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: This maybe quality inspection because the machine is mostly in a low intensity state with slight movement and low energy use

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 13 to 15 return to the same baseline pattern as the beginning with temperature around 20 to 21 pressure 1 vibration 0 material flow 0 tool position 0 and low energy

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the phases are idle for events 1 to 3 and 13 to 15 cutting for events 4 to 6 assembling for events 7 to 8 welding for event 9 and quality inspection for events 10 to 12
